nasb.text: In the eleventh year, in the first month, on the seventh of the month, the word of the Lord came to me saying,

esv.text: In the eleventh year, in the first month, on the seventh day of the month, the word of the Lord came to me:

cnv.text: 十一年正月初七日，耶和華的話臨到我說：

ccb.text: 第十一年一月七日，耶和华对我说：
